_README: DUMMY SPEC — placeholder values. Every entry has verified:false until confirmed against factory datasheet/output. Primitives read ONLY from this file. No drilling number is ever a literal in code. Replace values after the factory visit; do not touch the primitive functions.
_units: All dimensions in mm (the engine converts to mm10 integers internally).
_extends: Copied from CORE 2/hardware_specs.dummy.json. Fields marked ADDED were not in the original dummy but are structurally required by a primitive; the doc's 'data to bring back' lists them. They carry placeholder values and verified:false.

DUMMY_CUP_110.brand: TBD — SKU/brand still unknown; drilling pattern verified against factory door export
DUMMY_CUP_110.source: Example sets/prop-2/SHKOF ORTA CHAP ESHIK_7_1.XML (golden fixture, dump 2026-06-12)

cup.comment: PROVEN: Ø35.000 × 13.000 on Face 5, ×94 across the dump — research estimate 13mm was right

DUMMY_CUP_110.comment_offset: PROVEN: 21.5mm (research said 22.5 — WRONG). prop-0 doors show float noise 21.496/21.504 of the same value. Overlay dependence still unknown.

satelliteMarks.comment: PROVEN: the factory does NOT drill wing screws (research claimed Ø8×11 at ±24 — WRONG twice). It pricks 2× Ø3×1 marks per cup at cupX±26, 5.5mm beyond the cup centre (Y=27 for cups at Y=21.5). NOTE: the 4 prop-0 SHK ESHIK doors have cups with NO marks at all — possibly a different hinge SKU or operator setting; ask the constructor.

DUMMY_RASTEX_15.source: CONFIRMED against golden fixtures: YON BAK-1_4_1 (cam X=600 = 634−34) and POL_3_1 (cams X=34 & 954 = ±34 from each end) + mined_dump (Ø15×12.5 face ×357, Ø8×34 edge ×342)

camSeat.comment_depth: CONFIRMED Ø15.000 × 12.500 on Face 5 in both side & bottom fixtures (mined ×357). An 11.0mm variant also exists; this connector uses 12.5.
camSeat.comment_fromMatingEdge: CONFIRMED 34mm: the Ø15 cam-seat centre sits 34mm in from the mating edge on the face. YON BAK-1 cam at X=600 (Length 634−34); POL cams at X=34 and X=954 (Length 988−34).

dowelHole.comment_depth: CONFIRMED: factory edge Ø8 dowels drill 34mm deep (mined ×342; fixtures YON BAK-1 edge3 & POL edge3/edge4). Z = board mid-thickness (8 of 16).

DUMMY_PIN_5.source: CONFIRMED Ø5×11 against fixture YON BAK-1 (pins at X=365, rows Y=91.5/411.5) + mined_dump (Ø5×11 face)
DUMMY_PIN_5.comment_depth: CONFIRMED: factory Ø5 face pin holes drill 11mm

system32.source: verticalPitch 32 is the locked System-32 industry standard (confirmed); row setbacks now 91.5mm, grounded against factory file ORTA_BAK_6_1.XML (the shelfPinPattern proof matches ORTA_BAK exactly, replacing the old generic 37mm). Front 91.5 agrees across ORTA_BAK + YON_BAK, but the BACK row is cabinet-specific (ORTA_BAK 91.5 vs YON_BAK-1 108.5) and is NOT yet modelled per-design — so system32 stays verified:false (mayDriveDrilling => false) until per-design back rows land. firstHoleOffset (37) is unused.
system32.comment_firstOffset: System-32 standard: 37mm from the reference edge. Factory cabinets place custom rows; the solver uses the standard until per-design rows are confirmed.
system32.comment_rowSetbacks: GROUNDED from factory file tests/golden/xml/ORTA_BAK_6_1.XML: Ø5 shelf-pin rows sit 91.5mm from each Y edge (Face5 Y=91.5/411.5 on a 503-wide panel). Was a 37mm generic placeholder (which the engine actually loaded — the .ts copy had been corrected to 91.5 but this JSON, the one loadHardwareSpec reads, had drifted). Front 91.5 agrees across ORTA_BAK + YON_BAK; the BACK is cabinet-specific (ORTA_BAK 91.5 vs YON_BAK-1 108.5) so verified stays false until per-design rows are confirmed.

DUMMY_HANDLE_STD.brand: TBD — handle SKU/brand unknown; hole Ø/depth verified against factory door export
DUMMY_HANDLE_STD.source: Ø4.5×17 GROUNDED (mined_dump_holeclasses.csv:16, face-drill Ø4.500×17.000 ×24 in SHKOF…ESHIK door panels). The POSITION (128 c-c pair, 50mm edge offset) is a provisional standard like System-32 — not yet confirmed per handle SKU.

screw.comment: GROUNDED: Ø4.500 × 17.000 face-drill, a through-hole in a 16mm door for M4 handle screws.

DUMMY_HANDLE_STD.comment_centres: PROVISIONAL: 128mm is the common bow-handle c-c standard; retune per SKU once the handle catalog is verified.
DUMMY_HANDLE_STD.comment_edgeOffset: PROVISIONAL: 50mm inset from the door's opening edge (opposite the hinge). Retune once real handle placement is confirmed.
